scope: FQ-09U2: the hybrid adaptive score's vertical layer - six phase-locked stems whose volumes follow settlement and player truth with smoothed, data-defined movement, over the live context music, with fail-safe degradation and zero save/gameplay coupling. Opened with the mandated Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting spike.
summary: The spike came first and its finding is on record: nesting WORKS in Godot 4.6.1 (an AudioStreamSynchronized group played as an AudioStreamInteractive clip in the live smoke), but the shipped design is the parallel LayerPlayer because the approved suite has one shared stem set - the architecture followed the assets, not the type system. The bed: MusicManifest.load_stem_streams loads the six stems at runtime with the musical grid stamped on; _setup_layer_bed enforces the complete set and exact 53.333s loop lengths (any shortfall warns and disables layering while the context stream plays on untouched); the AudioStreamSynchronized starts from the context player's position in the same frame, so equal-length loops on one mix clock stay phase-aligned all session. The mix is entirely data (stem_mix in data/music_manifest.json, validator-enforced): foundation follows settlement Resilience, hearth follows Coherence (both cached from the 5s updated signal), the pressure stem follows the director's pressure score with a -16dB floor under storms (the storm texture - still no fifth context track), attunement follows the player's pool ratio, motion follows real mining/movement activity, and fracture wakes only past the collapse edge (pressure 0.7+). Volumes move at 6 dB/s toward targets and never snap - the smoke verifies the exact step (-40 -> -37.00 dB over 0.5s). Debug hooks expose layering_enabled/stem_targets/stem_volumes. Save round-trips carry zero stem/music keys and the bed survives loads. A concurrent Codex art drop (art/generated/players/) was left untracked for its own intake; this run committed explicit paths only.
acceptance: Nesting spike executed first and recorded either way (fq09u2_nesting_spike_recorded: plays=true)
Six stems live at exact grid length on the Music bus, phase-locked to the context stream (fq09u2_stem_bed_live)
Targets follow settlement Coherence/Resilience (fq09u2_targets_follow_settlement) and the pressure/collapse-edge model (fq09u2_pressure_and_fracture_layers)
Storm texture floor honored at low pressure (fq09u2_storm_texture)
Length mismatch disables layering only; context music unaffected (fq09u2_length_mismatch_fail_safe)
Zero stem/music save keys; bed survives load (fq09u2_state_not_saved)
Suite 234/234; validator, capsule doctor, git diff --check green
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. six stem OGGs + stem_mix contract (six layers, min<=max dB, positive smoothing)
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 234/234 PASS at 2026-07-10T17:46:39
haiku read-only verifier -> NO FINDINGS (7/7 items)
decisions: Architecture followed the assets: nesting is proven and recorded, but one shared stem set means the parallel LayerPlayer is the correct U2 shape; per-context stem arrangements can use nesting later
Phase lock by construction (same-frame start, equal sample-locked lengths, one mix clock) instead of continuous position correction
Storms remain a pressure contribution plus a stem-floor texture - the no-fifth-track rule held through both U increments
The fracture layer's collapse-edge knee ((pressure-0.7)/0.3) is the one code formula; every dB number and the smoothing rate live in the manifest
Fail-safe hierarchy: context music > layering - no stem problem can silence or destabilize the horizontal layer
Concurrent-lane discipline (learned in FQ-09M): explicit-path commits; the Codex players-art drop stays untracked for its own reviewed intake
Swarm: lead implementation with in-run spike, 1 haiku read-only diff verifier
risks: Combined context+stem loudness is mechanically safe (63-combination headroom proof) but needs an ear pass during play; all knobs are data
The additive bed doubles elements present in the context mixes - intended emphasis, tunable via stem_mix ranges
The players-art intake (and its renderer extension, incl. the FQ-09M swing-anchor note) is pending as its own run
Volume settings/pause behavior deliberately remain U3
next_action: FQ-09U3: stingers over temporary ducking, volume settings, pause behavior, final asset validation.
